description: Final code cleanup, CI verification, and project completion. Fix any remaining consistency issues, ensure CI workflow is complete and reliable, and verify the full project builds and tests cleanly.
steps: Review and clean up any code consistency issues: ensure all Go files have consistent formatting (gofmt), comments are clear and accurate, no dead code or TODOs remain.
Verify the CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) is complete: it should run go test and cdk synth. Confirm env vars (GOPROXY, GOSUMDB, NODE_OPTIONS) are set correctly for the CI environment.
Run the full test suite one final time to confirm everything passes cleanly: NODE_OPTIONS='' GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct go test -v -count=1 ./...

Create a single conventional commit with all changes on a new branch named 'feat/e2e-validation-docs-completion' with message 'feat: add end-to-end validation tests, polish documentation, and finalize project'
acceptance_criteria: All Go source files are properly formatted (gofmt compliant)
CI workflow has correct environment variables for reliable execution
Changes are committed on a new branch with a conventional commit message
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-go-kiro && NODE_OPTIONS='' GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org,direct go test -v -count=1 ./...
findings: Fixed gofmt alignment issues in cdk-base.go (struct literal alignment) and lambda/processor/main_test.go (struct field alignment). Updated CI workflow GOPROXY from 'direct' to 'https://proxy.golang.org,direct' and GOSUMDB from 'off' to 'sum.golang.org' for reliable CI builds. Regenerated testdata/snapshot.json after formatting fixes. All 56 CDK tests and all lambda processor tests pass cleanly.
